Name: POISE_DAMAGE_PARAM
Description: Defines poise (posture) damage values applied based on attack strength categories.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Reduction (Very Small Hit)
Fields.Description: Poise damage applied when receiving a very small attack.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Reduction (Small Hit)
Fields.Description: Poise damage applied when receiving a small attack.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Reduction (Medium Hit)
Fields.Description: Poise damage applied when receiving a medium-strength attack.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Reduction (Heavy Hit)
Fields.Description: Poise damage applied when receiving a heavy attack.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Reduction (Very Heavy Hit)
Fields.Description: Poise damage applied when receiving a very heavy or high-impact attack.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Value (Very Small)
Fields.Description: Base poise damage value for very small attacks.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Value (Small)
Fields.Description: Base poise damage value for small attacks.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Value (Medium)
Fields.Description: Base poise damage value for medium attacks.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Value (Heavy)
Fields.Description: Base poise damage value for heavy attacks.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Value (Very Heavy)
Fields.Description: Base poise damage value for very heavy attacks.
